enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Move Your Body'?

The song encourages listeners to let loose and enjoy life, celebrating movement and joy.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Vai Raja Vai'?

This song captures the fun and carefree spirit of the characters, enhancing the movie's lively atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by the iconic Ilaiyaraaja and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Move Your Body' released?

The song was released on December 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Move Your Body, the vibrant energy of the song perfectly complements the lively scenes in Vai Raja Vai. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it an ideal track for parties. The song conveys a message of freedom and enjoyment, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm. Overall, it captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of dancing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Move Your Body from Vai Raja Vai is an electrifying anthem that gets you on your feet! With the legendary Ilaiyaraaja's captivating vocals and Yuvan's dynamic composition, this track is a perfect blend of energy and rhythm. Experience the vibrant vibes that make this song a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Time has passed, the wind has turned, money has come, my friend.
The clouds have gathered, the fate has struck, the path has opened, my friend.
The trickster has won, the game has changed, oh my friend.
The obstacles have been cleared, the food has been eaten, oh my friend.
There is no yesterday, no tomorrow, today is not known to me.
Hey my friend, hey hey my friend, I am always the king.
Move your move your move body Move your move your move body mov mov mov move your mov mov mov move your move your body
If the wheel gets punctured, what will happen? You are the one who fixes the cycle tube.
I trusted only you, I relied on you, you were my guide in life.
For my desires, I wrote with ease, for my troubles, I made it a cousin's issue.
Even if born in this world, there is no loss, even if born twice, there is no loss.
We came here for a reason, you are the one thinking.
Move your move your move body - Ok Ma Move your move your move body
If there is money, there is money, daily night party.
Let's shower with money, yeah, floating in money.
Hey, if luck strikes, everything will happen, the rain will come, the sky will hold it.
For you, a new world will emerge, in it, everything will be fine for you.
I now have money, there is love, there are dreams, personally, I have my own gods.
My friend, oh my friend, this is just for us.
Put your destiny in the right place, you.
